MediScript.title: MediScript
MediScript.subtitle: AI Clinical Documentation
MediScript.description: Record a consultation. Get a structured SOAP note, ICD-11 codes, and an audit-ready encounter — all reviewed and signed by you.
MediScript.startEncounterRecordingDescription: Pick the patient, hit record, speak naturally. Pause and resume whenever you like. The AI will draft a SOAP note for your review.
MediScript.emptyDescription: Nothing recorded yet — your sessions will appear here.
MediScript.emptyHint: Run your first MediScript session to build a structured patient record from voice.
MediScript.browserNativeRecordingDesc: MediaRecorder + Web Audio. No app to install. Live waveform, pause and resume.
MediScript.structuredSoapOutputDesc: Subjective, Objective, Assessment, Plan — typed JSON, FHIR-aligned, stored as jsonb for future querying.
MediScript.icd11MappingDesc: Diagnoses are surfaced with WHO ICD-11 codes when available. Physician verifies before signing.
MediScript.doctorInTheLoopDesc: Every word the AI writes goes through your review. Nothing is auto-signed.
MediScript.newPageDescription: Voice in. Structured SOAP out. Reviewed and signed by you.

PharmaX.title: PharmaX
PharmaX.subtitle: AI Drug Safety & Prescribing
PharmaX.description: Three-layer drug safety. RxNorm-normalized identification, FDA-label warnings, and a intelligence-generated clinical summary — before you sign the prescription.
PharmaX.buildNewPrescriptionDescription: Pick a patient, add drugs from RxNorm, edit dose / frequency / route. The safety panel updates live as you go.
PharmaX.emptyDescription: Nothing prescribed yet — your prescriptions will appear here.
PharmaX.emptyHint: Build your first prescription with PharmaX's three-layer safety check.
PharmaX.newPageDescription: Add drugs from RxNorm. Safety panel updates live.
PharmaX.printDisclaimer: This prescription was generated by MediSoft C-OS

MediLab.title: MediLab
MediLab.subtitle: AI Lab Interpretation
MediLab.description: Curated reference ranges, automatic flagging, and a intelligence-generated narrative aimed at the audience you choose — physician or patient.
MediLab.recordLabResultDescription: Pick a curated panel, type each value, watch the flags appear live, save with one click.
MediLab.emptyDescription: Nothing recorded yet — saved lab panels will appear here.
MediLab.emptyHint: Add the first panel — MediLab will flag abnormal values and can generate a dual-audience narrative.
MediLab.newPageDescription: Enter values manually or paste from CSV. Flags are calculated live.

MediScan.title: MediScan
MediScan.subtitle: AI Radiology Assistant
MediScan.description: Intelligent reading of radiology and medical images. Doctor-friendly report, patient-friendly summary, both reviewed by you.
MediScan.readNewScanDescription: Upload an X-ray, CT/MRI export, ultrasound, or pathology image. Annotate. Get a dual-audience AI report. Save the encounter.
MediScan.emptyDescription: Nothing saved yet — your scans will appear here.
MediScan.emptyHint: Upload the first image to build your imaging archive.
MediScan.newPageDescription: Upload an image, annotate, get an AI-drafted report — review before saving.

MediDent.pageSubtitle: World's First Clinical-Grade AI Dental Platform — 15 Integrated Modules
MediDent.chartDescription: Select a condition below, then click teeth to apply. Use AI to analyze the full chart.
MediDent.markToothFirst: Please mark at least one tooth condition first
MediDent.reportPlaceholderHint: Fill in the form and click analyze to get Medical Intelligence insights
MediDent.radiographDescription: Describe radiographic findings for AI interpretation and diagnosis.
MediDent.radiographPlaceholder: Describe radiographic findings (e.g., 'radiolucency at apex of 46, horizontal bone loss in posterior mandible, impacted 48')
MediDent.periodontalDescription: Enter probing depths and clinical findings for AAP/EFP staging.
MediDent.periodontalPlaceholder:
Enter teeth with probing depths, e.g.:
16: B[3,4,5] L[2,3,4] BOP+ Recession:1mm Mobility:0
36: B[5,6,7] L[4,5,6] BOP+ Recession:3mm Mobility:2
MediDent.emergencyDescription: Medical Intelligence emergency assessment. Determines urgency and immediate actions.
MediDent.emergencyPlaceholder: Describe symptoms (e.g., 'severe throbbing pain in lower right molar, swelling, fever since yesterday')
MediDent.implantDescription: Comprehensive implant planning with bone assessment, system selection, and surgical approach.
MediDent.medicalHistoryPlaceholder: Medical history and relevant conditions (e.g., diabetes, bisphosphonates, bruxism, bone quality from CBCT...)
MediDent.orthodonticDescription: Cephalometric analysis, skeletal classification, and treatment option comparison.
MediDent.endodonticDescription: Pulp and periapical diagnosis, canal morphology analysis, treatment protocol.
MediDent.endodonticComplaintPlaceholder: Chief complaint (e.g., 'spontaneous throbbing pain, worse at night, pain to hot')
MediDent.treatmentPlanDescription: Generate comprehensive phased treatment plans with cost estimation and alternatives.
MediDent.treatmentComplaintPlaceholder: Chief complaint and dental concerns (e.g., 'multiple broken teeth, difficulty eating, wants to restore smile')
MediDent.treatmentPlanTip: Tip: Chart teeth in the Dental Chart module first for more accurate planning.
MediDent.prosthodonticDescription: Kennedy classification, material selection, and prosthetic design options.
MediDent.pediatricDescription: CAMBRA risk assessment, behavior management, and treatment planning for children.
MediDent.pediatricComplaintPlaceholder: Chief complaint and findings (e.g., 'pain in lower right, deep caries on 85 with pulp exposure, first dental visit')
MediDent.oralSurgeryDescription: Difficulty scoring, surgical planning, anesthesia, and post-op protocols.
MediDent.tmjDescription: DC/TMD criteria, pain assessment, ROM analysis, and treatment planning.
MediDent.tmjComplaintPlaceholder: Chief complaint (e.g., 'clicking on opening, pain on right side, limited opening for 6 months, bruxism history')
MediDent.dentalAIDescription: Ask any dental clinical question. Get evidence-based answers with references.
MediDent.dentalAIPlaceholder: Ask any dental question (e.g., 'What is the latest evidence on bioactive materials for direct pulp capping?')
MediDent.costEstimationDescription: Saudi market dental procedure cost estimates with CDT codes.
MediDent.costProceduresPlaceholder:
List procedures (one per line), e.g.:
Composite restoration tooth 16 (2 surfaces)
Root canal treatment tooth 36 (molar)
Dental implant tooth 46 (single with crown)
Surgical extraction tooth 48
MediDent.materialDescription: Evidence-based dental material selection for any procedure.

DiagnosisPage.title: Differential Diagnosis
DiagnosisPage.description: Enter patient symptoms for AI-powered diagnostic analysis

MediLabDetail.criticalResultsDescription: Review the highlighted rows below. Critical values warrant clinical attention before the patient leaves the encounter.
MediLabDetail.resultsDescription: {count} test(s). The bar shows where each value sits relative to its reference range.
MediLabDetail.disclaimer: Reference ranges shown are screening defaults from MediLab's curated library. The reporting laboratory's printed values always take precedence. AI narrative is for clinical decision-support only; verify before sharing with patients.

MediScanDetail.imageDescription: Annotations saved with this scan are shown overlaid. Pan, zoom, and inspect — drawing is disabled in detail view.
MediScanDetail.findingsDescription: Structured observations stored with this scan.
MediScanDetail.noFindingsDescription: The AI report above contains the narrative interpretation. Add structured findings on next read via /mediscan/new.

PharmaXDetail.safetyDescription: What the PharmaX three-layer check surfaced when this prescription was saved.
PharmaXDetail.noInteractionsDescription: At the time of saving, the FDA-label evidence and AI analysis surfaced no co-prescribing concerns.
PharmaXDetail.disclaimer: PharmaX is a clinical decision-support tool. It does not replace physician judgement. Always verify drug, dose, and route against primary references before dispensing.
